title: Stoneworks+
description: A light-weight modpack designed specifically for the Stoneworks Minecraft server.
body:
**Stoneworks+**

Stoneworks+ is a light-weight modpack designed to improve and work alongside the Stoneworks Minecraft server. This modpack's soul purpose is to immerse you within Stoneworks, without your game being turned into a slideshow.

**THIS MODPACK HAS NO AFFLIATION WITH STONEWORKS - THIS IS A FAN MADE MODPACK**
